sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Pfizer Ends Early-Stage Cancer Trial, Trimming Its Oncology Pipeline
feed.summary: Pfizer Inc. (PFE) has terminated its Phase 1 trial for the experimental cancer drug PF-08046037, which aimed to evaluate its efficacy as a monotherapy and in combination with sasanlimab for advanced malignancies. The decision is viewed as pipeline pruning rather than a major setback, as the program was early-stage and high-risk, suggesting Pfizer may reallocate resources to higher-conviction oncology programs. This move impacts company sentiment regarding R&D discipline and oncology focus but is unlikely to affect near-term earnings.

feed.title: Amgen Marks Key Milestone With Completion of Early MTAP-Null Cancer Combo Study
feed.summary: Amgen Inc. (AMGN) has completed a Phase 1/2 study for Anvumetostat in combination with IDE397, targeting MTAP-null solid tumors. The study focused on safety, tolerability, pharmacokinetics, pharmacodynamics, and early efficacy. The completion of this early-stage trial signals data collection is finished, moving towards potential disclosure and further analysis for investors.

feed.title: Union Pacific Delivers Earnings Beat, Shares Move Higher On Strong Quarterly Results
feed.summary: Union Pacific reported strong first-quarter 2026 results, beating analyst expectations with diluted EPS of $2.87 and adjusted diluted EPS of $2.93. The company saw a 5% increase in net income and a 3% rise in operating revenue, while also improving operational efficiency and reaffirming its 2026 outlook for mid-single-digit EPS growth. Shares traded higher following the announcement, as the company also discussed its proposed merger with Norfolk Southern Corp and AI initiatives.

feed.title: City Opera House aims to implement sustainability with DTE Energy sponsorship
feed.summary: The City Opera House has partnered with DTE Energy as its first green sponsor to promote environmentally conscious operations. This collaboration will fund sustainability initiatives such as transitioning to rechargeable microphone systems and using recycled paper. Future plans include installing a bike rack to encourage alternative transportation, aligning the institution's artistic mission with environmental responsibility.

feed.title: Union Pacific (NYSE:UNP) Announces Quarterly Earnings Results
feed.summary: Union Pacific (NYSE:UNP) reported strong first-quarter earnings, beating analyst expectations with an adjusted EPS of $2.93 and revenue of $6.22 billion. The company highlighted record operational productivity and strong commercial momentum, reaffirming its mid-single-digit EPS growth target for 2026 and a multi-year high-single to low-double-digit EPS CAGR through 2027. Despite challenges like rising fuel costs and merger-related uncertainties, analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating for the stock.

feed.title: ResMed Inc stock hits 52-week low at 218.27 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: ResMed Inc. stock has fallen to a 52-week low of $218.20, down 26% from its high, reflecting a 7.55% decline over the past year. Despite this downturn, InvestingPro analysis suggests the stock is undervalued, with management repurchasing shares. Recent Q2 fiscal 2026 earnings showed positive results, with EPS and revenue exceeding expectations, leading several analysts to raise their price targets for the company.

feed.title: Texas Instruments Stock Rallies After Q1 Beat On Strong Industrial And Data Center Demand
feed.summary: Texas Instruments (NASDAQ: TXN) stock rallied after reporting upbeat first-quarter results, driven by strong industrial and data center demand. Analysts from Rosenblatt Securities and JPMorgan reiterated their positive ratings and raised price targets for the company. The company reported impressive revenue growth and expanding gross margins, outperforming consensus estimates.

feed.title: Exxon, QatarEnergy ship first LNG cargo from Golden Pass export terminal (XOM:NYSE)
feed.summary: Exxon Mobil and QatarEnergy's joint venture, Golden Pass LNG, has shipped its first export cargo of liquefied natural gas from its Sabine Pass terminal in Texas. This marks a significant milestone for one of the largest new LNG export facilities.

feed.title: PNC to cut 777 FirstBank jobs this summer
feed.summary: PNC is set to eliminate 777 jobs at FirstBank's Lakewood, Colorado, headquarters following its recent acquisition. These reductions, primarily due to role overlap, will occur in two phases by late July, though some affected employees may find new roles within PNC. The bank emphasized its intention to retain all client-facing positions and establish Denver as a strategic technology hub, leveraging the local talent base.

feed.title: Petition asks Chemours to protect Okefenokee swamp
feed.summary: Conservationists delivered a petition with 26,000 signatures to Chemours, urging the company to permanently pledge against mining near the Okefenokee Swamp. The move comes after conservationists previously raised funds to buy land adjacent to the Okefenokee National Wildlife Refuge to prevent titanium dioxide harvesting. The petition highlights ongoing concerns about potential mining impacts on the sensitive ecosystem.

feed.title: Domino's cuts online pizza prices 50% for NFL Draft
feed.summary: Domino's is offering 50% off all menu-priced pizzas ordered online from April 20-26, coinciding with the NFL Draft. This deal includes various crust types and specialty pizzas. Additionally, customers ordering Handmade Pan or Parmesan Stuffed Crust online through June 14 will receive a free Domino's Slice Sauce.

feed.title: SPY vs. FIGB: SPDR S&P 500 ETF Provides Equity-Based Growth, While Fidelity Bond ETF Offers a Higher Yield
feed.summary: This article compares two ETFs, SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (SPY) and Fidelity Investment Grade Bond ETF (FIGB), highlighting their differing investment strategies and risk profiles. SPY offers equity-based growth with lower dividend yield and expense ratio, tracking the S&P 500, while FIGB provides higher income through investment-grade bonds but with a higher expense ratio. The analysis aims to guide investors on which ETF might be more suitable depending on their financial goals, whether growth or income.

feed.title: Lake County, Illinois, Sheriff’s Office Enhances Services With Tyler Technologies’ Public Safety Solutions
feed.summary: The Lake County Sheriff’s Office in Illinois has successfully implemented Tyler Technologies’ Enterprise Public Safety suite, including Enforcement Mobile, Civil Serve, and Corrections Mobile. This integration aims to enhance services for the community by improving accuracy, accessibility, and operational efficiency for officers. The new solutions reduce administrative burdens, minimize data entry, and provide real-time information, allowing officers to focus on critical safety issues.

feed.title: Union Pacific Corp Stock (UNP) Moved Up by 7.06% on Apr 23: Key Drivers Unveiled
feed.summary: Union Pacific Corp (UNP) stock increased by 7.06% on April 23, driven by a strong first-quarter 2026 earnings report that surpassed analyst expectations and highlighted significant operational efficiencies. The company reported growth in operating and freight revenue, despite a slight decrease in carloads, attributed to core pricing gains and fuel surcharges. UNP also reaffirmed a positive 2026 outlook, projecting mid-single-digit EPS growth and continued operating ratio improvements, further boosting investor confidence.

feed.title: Cass Information Systems (NASDAQ:CASS) Releases Quarterly Earnings Results, Beats Expectations By $0.04 EPS
feed.summary: Cass Information Systems (NASDAQ:CASS) reported quarterly earnings of $0.66 EPS, surpassing analyst expectations by $0.04, though revenue of $26.16 million significantly missed the $49.40 million consensus. Despite the EPS beat, shares fell by $1.64 to $46.83, and analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target price of $50.00. The company, which provides payment and information processing services, has a market cap of $604.46 million and a P/E of 17.89.

feed.title: Carter Bankshares (NASDAQ:CARE) Releases Quarterly Earnings Results, Misses Estimates By $0.09 EPS
feed.summary: Carter Bankshares (NASDAQ:CARE) reported its quarterly earnings, with an EPS of $0.40, missing the consensus estimate of $0.49 by $0.09. Despite the earnings miss, the company's revenue of $106.91 million significantly exceeded analysts' expectations of $42.47 million. Analysts have maintained a "Buy" rating for the stock, with institutional investors increasing their stakes, reflecting continued confidence in the company.

feed.title: Alphabet Stock Edges Higher on New AI Chip Launches and Cloud Momentum Ahead of Q1 Earnings
feed.summary: Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ: GOOG) saw its Class C shares rise modestly ahead of its Q1 earnings report, driven by new AI chip launches and strong cloud momentum. The company unveiled its latest Tensor Processing Unit (TPU) inference chips at the Cloud Next conference and rebranded Vertex AI under the Gemini Enterprise banner, signaling aggressive enterprise AI monetization. Analysts are largely bullish, raising price targets, as Alphabet's significant investments in AI infrastructure are expected to drive long-term growth despite near-term margin pressure.

feed.title: Boeing, GE Vernova Rallies Are Good News for Industrial Stocks. What the Charts Show.
feed.summary: Boeing and GE Vernova have shown significant rallies after their recent earnings reports, which suggests positive broader implications for the industrial sector and the market as a whole. Boeing has seen a 7% year-to-date increase and a 31% rise over the past year. This strength indicates good news for industrial stocks.

feed.title: Legit Security (VibeGuard) Named a Sample Vendor in Gartner® Report: “Best Practices to Mitigate Security Risks with Agentic Coding Tools”
feed.summary: Legit Security's VibeGuard offering has been recognized as a Sample Vendor in a recent Gartner report addressing security risks in agentic coding tools. VibeGuard aims to secure AI-powered software development by providing security feedback during code generation, protecting against risks like data leakage with agent guardrails, and securing the agentic supply chain with real-time scanning. This acknowledgment highlights VibeGuard's role in helping organizations leverage AI-led development processes efficiently and securely.

feed.title: ROL: Q1 delivered double-digit revenue growth, strong segment gains, and a positive full-year outlook
feed.summary: Rollins, Inc. (ROL) reported a strong Q1 2026 with 10.2% revenue growth and 6.6% organic growth, driven by broad-based gains across all segments and accelerated growth in March. Despite margin headwinds from insurance and claims, the company maintains a positive outlook, anticipating improved margins and robust cash flow conversion for the full year. This performance is based on the company's Q1 2026 audio transcript.

feed.title: Walmart remodeling 650 stores, redesigns private label
feed.summary: Walmart is undertaking a significant strategy to enhance its retail presence and private-label offerings. The company plans to open 20 new stores, remodel over 650 existing Supercenters and Neighborhood Markets, and revamp its Great Value private-label brand with new packaging emphasizing consistent nutrition information. These efforts aim to improve the shopping experience and reinforce Walmart's commitment to everyday low prices, despite global economic factors like the Iran War and higher fuel costs.

feed.title: Evergy Earnings Preview: What to Expect
feed.summary: Evergy, Inc. (EVRG) is set to release its Q1 2026 earnings, with analysts expecting a 16.7% increase in adjusted EPS to $0.63. Despite underperforming the S&P 500, EVRG has outperformed the utilities sector ETF and received a "Moderate Buy" rating from analysts with an 11.3% potential upside. The company recently raised its long-term adjusted EPS growth outlook through 2030, supported by new data center agreements and a substantial capital plan.

feed.title: Earnings call transcript: Snap-On Q1 2026 revenue beats forecast, EPS misses
feed.summary: Snap-On Incorporated reported mixed Q1 2026 results, with revenue beating forecasts at $1.21 billion (up 5.8% year-over-year) but EPS missing expectations at $4.69. Despite the EPS miss, the company showed resilience, driven by strong sales across all regions, particularly in critical industries and tools. Snap-On highlighted continued investments in innovation, proprietary databases, and efficiency to navigate macroeconomic uncertainties and maintain a positive outlook for future growth.

feed.title: White House to announce drug pricing deal with Regeneron, source says
feed.summary: The White House is expected to announce a drug pricing deal with Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, making it the final company among 17 targeted by President Trump to sign such an agreement. Regeneron's shares rose over 2% in morning trading following the news. The company has not yet commented on the development.

feed.title: Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results with a Conference Call on May 4
feed.summary: Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings Ltd. (NYSE: NCLH) will release its first-quarter 2026 financial results on Monday, May 4, 2026, at 6:30 a.m. Eastern Time, followed by a conference call and webcast at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time. This event will offer crucial insights into the company's financial performance and recovery within the cruise sector. The company emphasizes transparency, providing live and on-demand access to the discussion for investors, analysts, and the media.

feed.title: ResMed Inc stock hits 52-week low at 218.27 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: ResMed Inc. stock has fallen to a 52-week low of $218.20, significantly down from its high, reflecting a 7.55% decline over the past year and a 16% drop in the last six months. Despite this downturn, InvestingPro analysis suggests the stock is undervalued, with management actively buying back shares, signaling confidence. Recent Q2 fiscal 2026 earnings showed better-than-expected EPS and met revenue targets, leading several analysts to raise their price targets, indicating a mixed but generally positive outlook for the company.

feed.title: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman LLC Urges ChowChow Cloud International Holdings Ltd. Investors to Act: Class Action Filed Alleging Investor Harm Nationally Recognized Firm Urges Chow Investors to Explore Class Action Representation
feed.summary: A class action lawsuit has been filed against ChowChow Cloud International Holdings Ltd. (NYSE: CHOW) and certain officers, alleging federal securities law violations. The lawsuit claims that between September 16, 2025, and December 10, 2025, defendants made materially false and misleading statements, particularly regarding a market manipulation scheme and the risk of fraudulent trading activities. Investors who acquired Chow securities during this period are encouraged to join the class action, with a lead plaintiff deadline of May 12, 2026.

feed.title: Apollo Global Management, Inc. (APO) Shareholders Who Lost Money Have Opportunity to Lead Securities Fraud Lawsuit
feed.summary: The Law Offices of Frank R. Cruz announced that investors who suffered losses with Apollo Global Management, Inc. (APO) have an opportunity to lead a securities fraud class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that Apollo's CEO Marc Rowan and former CEO Leon Black frequently communicated with Jeffrey Epstein regarding the company's business, despite Apollo's assertions otherwise, leading to materially misleading statements about the company's prospects. Investors are invited to contact the law firm before the May 1, 2026, lead plaintiff deadline to participate or learn more about the lawsuit.

feed.title: Barclays Adjusts Price Target on Elevance Health to $408 From $393, Maintains Overweight Rating
feed.summary: Barclays has increased its price target for Elevance Health (ELV) to $408 from $393, while reiterating an Overweight rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects an updated outlook from the investment bank regarding the managed healthcare company. The article also notes other analyst adjustments for Elevance Health on the same day.

feed.title: EBay closes San Francisco office
feed.summary: EBay is closing its San Francisco office on Mission Street, resulting in 28 layoffs, as confirmed by a WARN notice. This move follows earlier staff reductions of 800 roles globally this year, as the marketplace giant refocuses on fashion, peer-to-peer sales, and resale, acquiring U.K. resale site Depop. Despite cost-cutting, eBay plans to hire in strategic areas, having recently exceeded earnings expectations.

feed.title: PepsiCo expands Quaker portfolio with Protein Rice Crisps
feed.summary: PepsiCo is expanding its Quaker brand with the introduction of new Quaker Protein Rice Crisps, aiming to blend functional benefits with appealing taste. These new crisps, available in chocolate caramel and tangy barbecue, offer 6 grams of protein and 9 grams of whole grains per serving. This launch reflects Quaker's ongoing commitment to providing consumers with nutritious and tasty snack options.

feed.title: Western Digital climbs as analysts lift price targets ahead of late-April earnings
feed.summary: Western Digital (WDC) stock is up 5.7%, driven by bullish analyst actions and optimism surrounding "AI storage" demand ahead of its late-April earnings report. Several major Wall Street firms have raised their price targets for WDC, citing stronger expectations for revenue and margins. The company's strategy, including a focus on high-capacity drives for cloud customers and AI infrastructure, is reinforcing positive sentiment.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley (MS) launches S&P 500 buffered notes—100% upside to $1,146 cap
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley Finance LLC (MSFL) has launched S&P 500 buffered participation securities, fully guaranteed by Morgan Stanley, offering investors 100% participation in positive S&P 500 performance up to a maximum payment of $1,146 per security. These principal-at-risk notes feature a 20% buffer against losses and a maturity date of November 4, 2027. The estimated value on the pricing date was approximately $983.20 per security, with payments subject to issuer credit risk and uncertain U.S. federal income tax treatment.

feed.title: Cantor Fitzgerald Reaffirms "Overweight" Rating for Regeneron Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ:REGN)
feed.summary: Cantor Fitzgerald has reissued an "Overweight" rating for Regeneron Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ:REGN) with an $800 price target, suggesting a 4.42% upside. The biopharmaceutical company recently surpassed quarterly EPS estimates, reporting $11.44 against a $10.74 consensus. Despite recent insider sales totaling approximately 3,774 shares ($2.94 million), the stock maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating among analysts, with a target price of $811.96.

feed.title: Shinhan Group's Q1 net income up 8.7% on year, hits $1.1 billion
feed.summary: Shinhan Group reported a first-quarter net income of 1.64 trillion won ($1.1 billion), marking an 8.7 percent increase from the previous year, surpassing market expectations. Operating profit rose 10.8 percent to 2.15 trillion won, while revenue saw a substantial increase of 76.8 percent to 28.49 trillion won. This strong performance indicates significant growth for the financial services giant.

feed.title: Banner Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Banner Corporation reported a Q1 2026 net profit of $54.7 million, or $1.60 per diluted share, an increase from $1.30 per share in Q1 2025, driven by a 6% rise in core operations revenue. Despite modest loan portfolio growth of 2.4% due to commercial real estate payoffs, the company increased its quarterly dividend by 4% to $0.52 per share, reflecting strong capital and liquidity. Management anticipates mid-single-digit loan growth for 2026 and expects some net interest margin expansion in the second half of the year.

feed.title: Evercore ISI Adjusts Price Target on Truist Financial to $58 From $55, Maintains Outperform Rating
feed.summary: Evercore ISI has increased its price target for Truist Financial (TFC) to $58 from $55, while reiterating an Outperform rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a positive outlook on the financial company's performance. The article also notes similar price target adjustments and maintained ratings from other major financial institutions like Goldman Sachs, RBC, and Baird.

feed.title: Horizon Kinetics (TPL) logs small open-market buy in Texas Pacific Land
feed.summary: Horizon Kinetics Asset Management LLC, a greater than 10% owner of Texas Pacific Land Corp (TPL), reported a small open-market purchase of 1 share at $437.87 on April 22, 2026. Following this transaction, Horizon Kinetics directly holds 3,435,502 shares, with a beneficial ownership reported as 9,974,556 shares in a recent Schedule 13D amendment. The filing indicates a neutral impact and sentiment despite the minor share acquisition.

feed.title: Clorox Shows What SAP S/4HANA Transformation Requires Before 2027
feed.summary: Clorox's five-year, $580 million SAP S/4HANA transformation offers critical lessons for organizations facing the 2027 maintenance deadline for SAP ECC. The case study emphasizes framing transformations as enterprise reinvention, planning around realistic benchmarks, designing for adoption, planning cutover as a financial event, and prioritizing real operating performance over mere go-live completion. It highlights that compressed timelines ahead of 2027 do not reduce risk but rather relocate it to post-go-live operations, stressing that transformation value is realized through sustained adoption and operational stability.

feed.title: Healthcare Briefs: McKesson Signs $1.25 Billion Deal With Apollo Funds for Minority Stake in MSS Business
feed.summary: McKesson has entered into a $1.25 billion agreement with Apollo Funds, granting Apollo an approximately 13 percent ownership interest in its medical-surgical solutions business. This deal is part of McKesson's strategy to separate its medical-surgical segment into a standalone company, with a potential initial public offering. Additionally, Medical City Alliance was recognized on Modern Healthcare’s 100 Top Hospitals list, and North Texas traffic fatalities have shown a decline due to regional safety initiatives.

feed.title: NXP Semiconductors surges as traders position ahead of earnings and margin-focused updates
feed.summary: NXP Semiconductors (NXPI) saw a 7.7% surge in its stock price, attributed to pre-earnings investor positioning and a renewed positive outlook on the company's ability to maintain margins in its automotive and industrial chip sectors. The surge comes ahead of its Q1 2026 earnings report scheduled for April 28, 2026, and follows analyst target hikes and reported price adjustments for its products. Insider trading activity for NXPI in the last six months shows more sales than purchases, while institutional investors have mixed views, with some significantly adding and others removing shares.

feed.title: Is Century Communities (CCS) Price Surge Justified By Conflicting Valuation Signals
feed.summary: Century Communities (CCS) has seen recent price surges, but its valuation signals are conflicting. A Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis suggests the stock is significantly overvalued by 317.8%, while a Price vs. Earnings (P/E) comparison, particularly against Simply Wall St's proprietary "Fair Ratio," indicates it might be undervalued. The article presents bullish and bearish narratives for CCS, with fair values ranging from US$56 to US$72 per share, highlighting different assumptions about revenue growth and profit margins.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley raises Hasbro stock price target on strong Q1 results
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has increased its price target for Hasbro (NASDAQ:HAS) shares to $122 from $119, maintaining an Overweight rating, following Hasbro's better-than-expected preliminary first-quarter 2026 results. The company reported roughly 10% revenue growth against consensus estimates of 3% and a significant operating margin beat. Analysts, including UBS and Roth/MKM, remain optimistic about Hasbro's profitability and the strength of its Wizards of the Coast products, despite the stock currently appearing slightly overvalued by some analyses.

feed.title: BP (NYSE: BP) 2026 AGM: key votes, rejected articles and ACCR result
feed.summary: BP p.l.c. held its 2026 Annual General Meeting where 21 of 24 resolutions passed with strong majorities, including approval of the Annual Report, directors' remuneration, and board elections. However, two special resolutions regarding new Articles of Association and the revocation of earlier resolutions, along with a shareholder resolution from the Australasian Centre for Corporate Responsibility (ACCR), were rejected by shareholders. BP noted the opposition to these recommendations and plans to engage with shareholders, providing an update within six months.

feed.title: BP Chair Manifold re-elected but two board proposals rejected at AGM (BP:NYSE)
feed.summary: BP Chair Albert Manifold was re-elected at the company's annual general meeting with 81.8% of the vote. Despite his re-election, two board proposals were rejected by investors, indicating discontent regarding BP's climate disclosures and corporate governance practices.

feed.title: BioMarin Pharmaceutical: Ian T. Clark Named As Chair
feed.summary: BioMarin Pharmaceutical announced that its Board of Directors has appointed Ian T. Clark as Chair of the Board, effective June 2, 2026, following his election at the company's Annual Meeting of Stockholders. Clark will succeed Richard A. Meier, who is retiring after two decades of service. This transition marks a new phase for BioMarin as it continues to execute its long-term strategy and global expansion in rare disease treatments.

feed.title: PulteGroup Stock Down on Earnings Q1 Miss, Revenues Beat on Orders
feed.summary: PulteGroup's Q1 2026 earnings missed estimates, and revenues, while beating expectations, declined year-over-year. The homebuilder faced profitability and margin pressure due to affordability concerns and increased incentives, leading to a 2% drop in pre-market trading. Despite lower closing volumes and pricing, net new orders increased, supported by a growing community count, offering some demand stability.

feed.title: Zacks.com featured highlights include Micron and Vicor
feed.summary: Zacks Investment Research highlights Micron Technology (MU) and Vicor Corp. (VICR) as profitable stocks with significant upside potential, noting their strong net income ratios and substantial share price increases over the past year. Micron, a memory and storage provider, has a 12-month net profit margin of 41.5%, while Vicor, a developer of modular power components, has a 26.2% margin. Both companies are featured for their consistent profits and ability to effectively manage expenses from revenues.

feed.title: Peru Selects Lockheed Martin F-16 Block 70, Strengthening Sovereignty and U.S. Partnership
feed.summary: Peru has announced its decision to purchase 12 new F-16 Block 70 aircraft from Lockheed Martin to modernize its fighter fleet and enhance national defense. This acquisition signifies a major step in transforming the Peruvian Air Force, reinforcing its strategic partnership with the United States, and fostering industrial collaboration. The F-16 Block 70 is described as the most advanced F-16 ever built, offering superior operational performance, a long service life, and advanced technology.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley cuts gold price forecast by almost 10%
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has lowered its gold price forecast for the second half of 2026 by almost 10% to $5,200 per ounce, attributing the adjustment to a significant shift in the macroeconomic landscape. This revision follows a six-week selloff and rising real interest rates, prompting analysts to view gold more as a macroeconomic barometer reflecting liquidity and monetary policy rather than solely a hedge against uncertainty. Despite this downward revision, gold has still seen notable volatility this year, including an all-time high of nearly $5,600 an ounce, and remains up 9% year-to-date.
